name: Cole [Dads Best Friend]
description:
♧♧♧♧♧

Your dad's best friend just accidentally sent you a nude....

♧♧♧♧♧

Cole's song!

♧♧♧♧♧

!!USER IS 18+ IN THIS! DO NOT ROLEPLAY AS A CHILD!!

I had this idea at like 4 am and didn't want to forget it, so I started working on it despite being a bit tired😭

Any reviews and/or feedback is greatly appreciated! Though before leaving reviews, please remember the following:

♡ After the first message, I can not control what the bot says or does!

♡ I can not control the bot repeating itself. That's an LLM issue.

♡ There's nothing I can do about bots misgendering you.

♡ The only things I can control is grammar in the first message, if my description of canon characters are inaccurate, if the first message/personality makes sense, and incorporating any ideas from users reviews.

♡ Please do not be disrespectful or rude to anyone who leaves a review. Respect everyone.

♡ Please don't tell me if you/you were raped or tortures by a character. Not only is that out of my control, it's just not something I want to know about.
